tables.name: backtest_pool
tables.comment: 回测股票池 - 回测数据筛选入口

tables.name: backtest_score_daily
tables.comment: 个股综合评分每日回测

tables.name: cycle_judgment
tables.comment: 周期判定表(悟道篇) — 指数周期状态

tables.name: daily_market_summary
tables.comment: 每日市场汇总表 — 数出一源

tables.name: daily_snapshot
tables.comment: 每日快照汇总表 — 全市场指标快照

tables.name: hengjiyuan_evaluation
tables.comment: 恒纪元评估表 — 悟道篇恒纪元状态评估

tables.name: momentum_daily_index
tables.comment: 每日动量分层指标 — 因子IC/多空利差报表

tables.name: season_daily_signal
tables.comment: 每日操作信号表 — 季节判定衍生操作建议

tables.name: season_state
tables.comment: 恒纪元四季判定结果表

tables.name: signal_change_log
tables.comment: 信号变更日志表 — 信号变更审计

tables.name: watch_pool_snapshot
tables.comment: 监控池快照表 — 最新评分截面数据(80~94只)

backtest_hengjiyuan_daily.name: is_correct
backtest_hengjiyuan_daily.comment: 判断是否正确(1=春/夏后上涨 or 秋/冬后下跌)

backtest_hengjiyuan_summary.name: spring_win
backtest_hengjiyuan_summary.comment: 春-次数/胜率(平均5日收益)

backtest_pool.name: status
backtest_pool.comment: 状态：ACTIVE=启用 INACTIVE=停用 ARCHIVED=归档

cycle_judgment.name: target_code
cycle_judgment.comment: 目标代码(大盘=000001.SH,板块代码,个股=ts_code)

portfolio_holdings.name: lock_until
portfolio_holdings.comment: 锁仓截止日（该日前不可卖出）

portfolio_holdings.name: lock_active
portfolio_holdings.comment: 是否处于锁仓期（1=锁仓中，0=已解锁）

season_state.name: index_code
season_state.comment: 指数代码, MARKET=全市场综合

strategy_config.name: strategy_type
strategy_config.comment: 策略类型: STEP_LOCK=阶梯锁仓, FIXED_LOCK=固定锁仓, STOP_LOSS=仅止损

strategy_config.name: reduce_pct
strategy_config.comment: 减仓阈值(0=不启用, 亏损超此值触发减半仓)

strategy_signal.name: reason_chain
strategy_signal.comment: 理由链: 夏+恒纪元+三买确认+机游合力

strategy_signal.name: gate_triggered
strategy_signal.comment: 是否触发安全闸门(触发则为空信号)

strategy_signal.name: buy_trade_date
strategy_signal.comment: 买入日（锁仓计算的基准日）

strategy_signal.name: lock_until
strategy_signal.comment: 锁仓截止日（该日前不可SELL，signal被强制HOLD）

strategy_signal_daily.name: holding_status
strategy_signal_daily.comment: NONE=未持仓, HOLDING=持仓中, CLOSED=已平仓

strategy_signal_daily.name: days_to_check
strategy_signal_daily.comment: 距下一个检查点天数(负数=已过检查点)

strategy_signal_daily.name: current_checkpoint
strategy_signal_daily.comment: 当前所在检查点: 0=保护期, 10=10日检查, 20=20日检查, 30=30日检查, 31=30日+

strategy_signal_daily.name: checkpoint_threshold
strategy_signal_daily.comment: 当前检查点的评分阈值

strategy_signal_daily.name: checkpoint_passed
strategy_signal_daily.comment: 检查点是否通过: 1=通过续持, 0=不通过应平仓

strategy_signal_daily.name: action
strategy_signal_daily.comment: HOLD=持有, SELL=卖出, STOP_LOSS=止损卖出, BUY=买入, WAIT=等待

strategy_signal_daily.name: price_source
strategy_signal_daily.comment: 价格来源: daily=日K线, realtime=实时行情

trend_score.name: composite_score
trend_score.comment: 综合评分=(周期×0.3+结构×0.4+情绪×0.3)×置信度

trend_score.name: confidence_mult
trend_score.comment: 置信度系数(恒纪元调整)

v_daily_comprehensive.name: reason_chain
v_daily_comprehensive.comment: 理由链: 夏+恒纪元+三买确认+机游合力
